pred_reason: The contract contains critical arithmetic underflow vulnerabilities in tick cumulative calculations (SWC-101) and potential reentrancy risks despite external calls being to view functions, indicating reliance on external state (SWC-107). These issues directly impact price oracle integrity and contract security. Evidence: Underflow confirmed in (tickCumulatives[1] - tickCumulatives[0]) when tickCumulatives[1] < tickCumulatives[0]; External calls to poolAddress (slot0, observe) introduce reentrancy assumptions despite being view functions; No state writes before/after calls but dependency on external pool state creates indirect reentrancy surface
